subject: Live in 1 Hour: Scale Kubernetes with Certainty

body_html:
Kubernetes Shouldn't Require a Superhero. Join us live to move beyond operational heroics with an immutable foundation. ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  

Hi A,

 

Is your platform team spending more time firefighting than building? As Kubernetes scales, manual patching and infrastructure drift often become bottlenecks that stall your roadmap and create compliance risks. Join us live in 1 hour to learn how to move beyond a coping-based strategy and adopt an API-driven, immutable foundation that scales without increasing your headcount.

Register to Join

Webinar Key Takeaways:

  • Stop the Toil: Identify the hidden infrastructure patterns stalling your delivery.
  • Hardened Security: Eliminate the conditions that create risk in regulated industries.
  • Quantify Cost: Build the business case for a more stable, automated foundation.
  • Systemic Certainty: Shift to a model where predictability is engineered-in from the start.

Can't make it live? No worries, register anyway and we'll send you the recording.

Featured Webinars

Developer-led observability: Debugging distributed and AI systems with runtime telemetry
Join us on April 16 for a live webinar on integrating observability into everyday workflows. You’ll see real-world examples and live debugging demonstrations that show how to move faster, escalate less, and build more reliable AI-driven systems from the start.

The next step for continuous delivery: An IDP-driven platform

Continuous Delivery solved deployment, but it hasn't solved the 'access' problem. As AI speeds up coding, pipelines remain gated by tribal knowledge and manual handoffs. Join us on April 23 to learn how platform teams bridge the gap between catalog data, environments, and pipelines to eliminate friction and automate consistency.

 

Break the cycle of spending $250bn on manual IT operations with the IT knowledge graph
Rules-based automation solves only 20% of IT problems, leaving a $250 billion manual burden. BigPanda’s IT Knowledge Graph fixes this by connecting fragmented data and institutional knowledge, allowing AI to handle the complex reasoning rules cannot. Join us on April 28 to see how this shift drives 430% ROI and reduces outages by replacing reactive, manual operations.

 

Beyond the SRE: Democratizing observability data with GenAI
GenAI is transforming observability from a specialized SRE domain into a democratized asset, allowing anyone to query complex system data using plain language. Join us on May 12 to democratize insights via natural language, bridge data silos with OpenTelemetry, and future-proof your platform for proactive, agentic AI.

Connect with The New Stack
